text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin invites me out for a<n>slightly late
New Year's shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming, Trainer<n><username>!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for inviting you out so suddenly,<n>but...
there's something that I need to<n>share with you.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's always a Kiryuin family<n>gathering
for New Year's. It's mainly<n>a chance for us to
exchange the latest<n>information, but...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
This year, my great-aunt<n>complimented me for
the first time.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: She said I've become a good mentor.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
My great-aunt has an important role<n>in the URA,
and she was once a skilled<n>trainer who brought
honor to the<n>Kiryuin family.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's why... no matter how much the<n>people
around me say what a good<n>job I'm doing, my
family always tells<n>me I still have a lot to learn.
choice_data_list: And now they've recognized your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I was able to show them that<n>I'm worthy
of the family name, even if<n>only a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...And that's because of you, Trainer<n><username>.
So today, I'd like to thank<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Your perspective has shown me<n>parts of
myself I couldn't see. With<n>you by my side, I've
been able to<n>continue improving.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful to have you as my<n>peer! Let's
continue to push each<n>other to be the best
trainers that we<n>can be!
choice_data_list: Thank you! I feel the same!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It seems we've managed to<n>get each
other properly motivated for<n>the new year!

text_block_list.name: Male Barker
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! You seem like you've<n>got a lot of
spirit! Why don't you try<n>putting your strength to
the test?

text_block_list.name: Male Barker
text_block_list.text:
By participating in the New Year's Tile<n>Smashing
Extravaganza!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That sounds like another great<n>source of
motivation!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Thinking back, I used to have a<n>real
fondness for karate!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sounds of smashing tiles and<n>Kiryuin's
vigorous shouts echo<n>through the January sky.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that my friendship<n>with Trainer
Kiryuin will continue to<n>grow from here.
